VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: PipelineEndToEndIT test 'should complete full pipeline trigger-to-completion flow via API (VAL-CROSS-001)' PASSED — sends POST /api/v1/pipeline/trigger, polls GET /api/v1/pipeline/runs/{runId} via Awaitility until status=COMPLETED (within 30s), verifies briefSnapshot has: tldrBullets array (length=4), non-empty deltaBullets, non-empty sources with title/url/whyItMatters/credibilityLabel/credibilityReason, non-empty uncertaintyNotes, coverageWindow with days (numeric)/dateFrom/dateTo, steps array present
VAL-CROSS-001.testMethod: should complete full pipeline trigger-to-completion flow via API (VAL-CROSS-001)

VAL-CROSS-002.evidence: PipelineEndToEndIT test 'should resume failed pipeline and complete via API (VAL-CROSS-002)' PASSED — triggers pipeline with MockLlmAdapter configured to fail on 'critic', polls until FAILED status, verifies PLANNER/SEARCH/RESEARCHER=COMPLETED and CRITIC=FAILED, fixes fixture to critic-success, sends POST resume, polls until COMPLETED, verifies all 5 steps COMPLETED and briefSnapshot present with non-empty tldrBullets
VAL-CROSS-002.testMethod: should resume failed pipeline and complete via API (VAL-CROSS-002)

VAL-CROSS-003.evidence: PipelineEndToEndIT test 'should have valid briefSnapshot structure with all required sections (VAL-CROSS-003)' PASSED — triggers pipeline, polls until COMPLETED, verifies: tldrBullets is non-empty array with 3-6 items, deltaBullets is non-empty array, sources is non-empty array with first source having non-empty string title/url/whyItMatters/credibilityLabel/credibilityReason, uncertaintyNotes is non-empty string, coverageWindow has days > 0 and dateFrom/dateTo present
VAL-CROSS-003.testMethod: should have valid briefSnapshot structure with all required sections (VAL-CROSS-003)
